decisionPoints.trigger: Displaced intra-articular calcaneus fracture with acceptable soft tissues after swelling interval
decisionPoints.action: Proceed with delayed calcaneus ORIF for posterior facet restoration; document non-weight-bearing plan

decisionPoints.trigger: Calcaneus fracture with severe hindfoot swelling, blisters, or compromised plantar skin
decisionPoints.action: Splint and elevate; delay definitive fixation until soft tissues recover; screen for associated spine injury
